subcodes.title: Words to Mrs Rosenberg, Cropper, and Heron, spoken on 1913-01-20
subcodes.first_line: Although this globe of ours is very small, yet it has all these living beings. Can it be imagined that those tremendous bodies hanging in a limitless atmosphere are without inhabitants!
subcodes.subjects: @limits of the intellect, @celestial spheres [aflak]; planets; astronomy, @infinity and eternity, @plenitude; the pervasiveness of life in the cosmos, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
